tool_name: Refrigeration System COP, Refrigerant Mass Flow & Condenser Heat Rejection

inputs.name: Refrigerant Enthalpy at Compressor Suction (h_1)
inputs.note: From refrigerant P-h chart or REFPROP at T_evap + superheat

inputs.name: Refrigerant Enthalpy at Expansion Valve Inlet (h_3)
inputs.note: From refrigerant P-h chart at T_cond - subcooling

inputs.name: Ideal Compressor Discharge Enthalpy (h_2s)
inputs.note: From refrigerant P-h chart: isentropic compression endpoint at P_cond

formulas: q_evap_kj_kg = h_evap_out_kj_kg - h_cond_out_kj_kg   // [kJ/kg] Specific Refrigerating Effect (q_evap) Reference: ASHRAE Fundamentals 2021 Ch.2 — vapour-compression cycle

h_2act_kj_kg = h_evap_out_kj_kg + (h_cond_in_kj_kg - h_evap_out_kj_kg) / (compressor_isentropic_eff_pct / 100)   // [kJ/kg] Actual Compressor Discharge Enthalpy (h_2act) Reference: η_is = (h_2s - h_1) / (h_2act - h_1)
w_comp_kj_kg = h_2act_kj_kg - h_evap_out_kj_kg   // [kJ/kg] Specific Compressor Work (w_comp)
m_dot_kg_s = Q_evap_kw / q_evap_kj_kg   // [kg/s] Refrigerant Mass Flow Rate
W_comp_kw = m_dot_kg_s * w_comp_kj_kg   // [kW] Compressor Power Input Reference: ASHRAE 15-2022 §8
COP = Q_evap_kw / W_comp_kw; Q_cond_kw = Q_evap_kw + W_comp_kw   // [dimensionless, kW] System COP and Condenser Heat Rejection Reference: First Law of Thermodynamics energy balance; EN 378-1:2016 §5

V1.error_msg: Condensing temperature must exceed evaporating temperature by at least 10 K — check cycle temperature inputs

V2.error_msg: Specific refrigerating effect ≤ 0: h_1 must exceed h_3 — verify P-h chart enthalpy values

V3.error_msg: COP < 1.0: very low system efficiency — verify enthalpy inputs and compressor efficiency

smart_warnings.message: Lift (T_cond - T_evap) > 55 K: consider two-stage compression or economiser circuit per ASHRAE 15 §8.4
Isentropic efficiency < 55%: compressor in degraded condition — check valve condition, clearance volume, and refrigerant charge
Suction superheat < 5 K: liquid slugging risk — compressor mechanical damage imminent; adjust expansion valve
Low COP for moderate evaporating temperature: check for non-condensables in system or refrigerant contamination
Condenser duty >80% above evaporator: high heat rejection load — verify cooling tower or condenser coil capacity
